JUDGE JAMES J MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT IGNACIA MEZA. DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, AND TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD IN OPEN COURT BY PLTF'S COUNSEL. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST THE DEFT. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANO, EDUARDO MEZA, IGNACIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 270 TURK ST 	08, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-12-1994, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
